# Pisama

> Multi-agent failure detection and self-healing platform for AI systems.

Pisama detects 42 failure modes in LLM agent systems, including infinite loops, state corruption, persona drift, hallucination, prompt injection, convergence issues, and coordination breakdowns. It provides AI-powered fix suggestions with automatic rollback.

## Capabilities

- 42 failure mode detectors (31 production-grade, F1 > 0.70)
- Self-healing with approval policies and rollback
- Root cause analysis for multi-agent traces
- Quality scoring and regression detection
- OpenTelemetry-based trace ingestion

## Supported Frameworks

- LangGraph
- CrewAI
- AutoGen
- n8n
- Dify
- OpenClaw
- Claude Code
- Any framework via OpenTelemetry

## API

Base URL: https://mao-api.fly.dev/api/v1
Authentication: Bearer token or API key (X-MAO-API-Key header)
Documentation: https://docs.pisama.com
API Reference: https://mao-api.fly.dev/docs

## Key Endpoints

- POST /traces - Ingest agent traces
- GET /detections - List detected failures
- POST /healing/trigger/{detection_id} - Trigger self-healing
- GET /health - Health check

## Links

- Website: https://pisama.ai
- Documentation: https://docs.pisama.com
- API Docs: https://mao-api.fly.dev/docs
- GitHub: https://github.com/tn-pisama/mao-testing-research
